_expected_failure: M2-T006 (contract 1.3.0): staleness.stale is true but upstream_error_type is missing. The conditional (allOf/anyOf) requires that a stale serve names the typed upstream failure that forced the last-known-good fallback - a payload may never claim staleness without saying why.

reproducibility.coverage_policy: coverage_status is derived only from review status and conflict/drift state (PRD section 12).
